nu-map/documentation / src/ / ports/ / ICreditSystem.js

ICreditSystem credit units

Credit unit naming and enrollment load thresholds. Affects every credit label in the UI and every enrollment-status badge — override if your institution uses anything other than 3-credit courses.

Port key
"creditSystem"
Consumed by
CourseCard (credit label), GradPanel (SH totals), Header (plan stats), PDF export
Override when
Unit name ≠ "credits", standard value ≠ 3, or your full-time threshold differs

Contract

FieldTypePurpose
unitNamestringShort label in all UI contexts: course chips, totals, badges. e.g. "SH", "credits", "ECTS", "units".
unitLabelstringLong label for tooltips and accessibility. e.g. "Semester Hours", "Credits".
standardValuenumberTypical credits for one course. Used as the default when a course has no credit value in catalog data.
fullTimeMinnumberMinimum credits per semester for full-time enrollment status badge.
partTimeMaxnumberMaximum credits still considered part-time. Typically fullTimeMin − 1.
semesterMaxnumberHard maximum credits allowed per semester. Semesters exceeding this show a warning.

Northeastern vs generic defaults

FieldNU (northeastern/)Generic default
unitName"SH""credits"
unitLabel"Semester Hours""Credits"
standardValue43
fullTimeMin1212
partTimeMax1111
semesterMax2221

Common credit systems

SystemunitNamestandardValuefullTimeMinsemesterMax
US semester (3-credit)"credits"31218–21
US semester (4-credit, like NU)"SH"41220–22
US quarter system"units"41220
ECTS (European)"ECTS"63036
✦
If your institution uses a credit system not listed here, set unitName to whatever abbreviation appears on transcripts. The planner treats credit values as opaque numbers — no conversion logic is needed.
